subcodes.first_line: Praise and glorification, exaltation and splendor befit the Sovereign of the Kingdom of Utterance, Who through the attraction of the Most Exalted Word, from nothingness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد و ثنا ذکر و بها مالک ملکوت بیان را لایق و سزا که از جذب کلمه علیا از نیست
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @the divine emanation; the all-pervading bounty of God, @knowledge; recognition of God, @suffering and imprisonment
